name: AI Job Search and Resume Automation - Sanitized
description: Sanitized portfolio version of an n8n workflow for job discovery, duplicate tracking, LLM-assisted resume tailoring, ATS-friendly PDF generation, Google Drive upload, and Gmail summary notifications.
notes: This file is a sanitized placeholder workflow for public portfolio review.
The original private n8n export contained live credentials, private document IDs, API tokens, and personal resume data.
Before using this workflow, replace all placeholders with your own n8n credentials and environment values.
Do not commit real API keys, Supabase keys, Google Drive IDs, email addresses, or private resume content.

implementation_notes.n8n: Import the private workflow into your own n8n instance and replace sensitive values with environment variables or n8n credentials before sharing.
implementation_notes.scripts: The sanitized code-node logic is included separately in the scripts directory for easier review.
implementation_notes.database: A sample Supabase schema is included in samples/sample-supabase-schema.sql.
implementation_notes.prompts: A sanitized prompt template is included in docs/prompts.md.
